name: Monogatari RPG
description: The favorite anime for Hashitposting just arrived, there from vote bot chat. So, this bot have... Koyomi Araragi Karen Araragi, Tsukihi Araragi, Hitagi Senjougahara, Mayoi Hachikuji, Suruga Kanbaru, Nadeko Sengoku, Tsubasa Hanekawa, Black Hanekawa, Shinobu Oshino, Sodachi Oikura, Ougi Oshino, Meme Oshino, Deishuu Kaiki, Yozuru KagenuiIzuko, Gaen, Dramaturgy, Episode, Guillotine Cutter, Deathtopia Virtuoso Suicide-Master. Well, i think I'm gonna enjoy about do some bot but sometime I'm wanted for break for bit. Enjoy? Thanks.
